final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of Korean café-style coffee and desserts, formatted for Instagram Stories with hand-drawn annotations.

Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, editorial food photography with hand-drawn sketch overlay, Korean café influencer style, magazine rough-note aesthetic
Composition: flat-lay or 45-degree angle, centered arrangement of coffee cup and dessert on marble or wooden table, negative space for annotations, Instagram Stories vertical format
Subject: latte art in ceramic cup, Korean-style dessert (bingsu or pastry), minimal props like dried flowers or café menu card, no people
Scene/backdrop: bright Korean café interior with soft natural light, clean minimalist table setting, blurred background suggesting cozy space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from window, bright and airy atmosphere, gentle shadows
Color palette: warm browns from coffee, soft pastels from dessert, neutral whites and beiges, muted earth tones
Text (verbatim): "清爽" "温柔的甜味" "湿润" "最高" "放松" "美好时光" "幸福过头了～"
Annotations: thin white hand-drawn sketch lines, rough uneven strokes tracing object outlines, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance, 70% hiragana 30% simple kanji, diary-style short comments, decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) with intentional white space
Constraints: annotations must follow the object contours naturally, text should feel like spontaneous diary notes, maintain fashionable yet relaxed mood
Avoid: photorealistic 3D render look, cluttered composition, overly polished digital illustration, stock photo aesthetic, watermark
